rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, August 10, 2010, line 1. DEFENDANTS KENNETH WOO, MEA FINANCIAL SERVICES'S DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT is continued to August 17, 2010 to be heard with motion to strike demurrer. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: ROBERT N. COLEN VS. MICHAEL HYATT et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Summary Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, August 10, 2010, line 2. DEFENDANT MICHAEL HYATT'S Motion To Vacate Summary Judgment is denied. C C P section 473.5 does not apply because that provision is implicated where a lack of notice leads to a default. Here, defendant had notice of the action and filed a general demurrer. Although the notice of motion was defective, the date of the hearing was properly reflected on numerous pleadings. Defendant's main issue is with the July 16, 2009 order deeming the admissions admitted. Those findings are conclusive and defendant's application for relief from that discovery order is too late. Defendant does not cite good cause for relief from that discovery order. Insufficient showing of mistake, inadvertence, surprise, or excusable neglect. =(302/CWW)
